description_long: This object is a straight-edged sword with a dark, metallic blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is long and flat, with subtle ridges running along its length, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The crossguard is simple and slightly curved, providing basic hand protection without elaborate ornamentation. The handle is cylindrical and appears to be made of the same dark material as the blade, ending in a faceted pommel for balance and grip. The entire sword has a matte, almost monochromatic finish, suggesting it is designed for function rather than display. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative features on any part of the sword.
description: A straight, dark metallic sword with a simple crossguard and cylindrical handle, featuring a matte finish and no ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and handle with the faceted pommel clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's flat geometry.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, faceted pommel, no visible wrapping or texture
